name: FlowBoard
description: Project workspaces, dashboard, and project-context hook for OpenClaw agents.

dashboardPort.description: Optional dashboard port the project-context hook uses when dashboardBaseUrl is not set.

dashboardBaseUrl.description: Optional dashboard API base URL for the project-context hook, for example http://localhost:18843.

projectsDir.label: Projects Directory
projectsDir.help: Optional path for FlowBoard project files. Prefer the FLOWBOARD_PROJECTS_DIR environment variable for service deployments.

dashboardPort.label: Dashboard Port
dashboardPort.help: Optional local dashboard port for the project-context hook when the service does not run on 18790.

dashboardBaseUrl.label: Dashboard Base URL
dashboardBaseUrl.help: Optional full base URL for the project-context hook. Prefer this for proxy, tunnel, or non-localhost setups.
